description: Vertical graphic for ICE's Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement (VOICE) office. The right two-thirds is a soft-focus photograph of two pairs of hands clasped together (one person beside another seated person in an interior with curtains). The left third is a semi-transparent blue overlay panel with white sans-serif text: 'If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to' followed by a large bold 'HELP'. A diagonal orange accent shape cuts across the lower-right corner. A white footer bar spans the bottom containing the phone number '1-855-48-VOICE' (blue) and 'ICE.GOV/VOICE' (orange), a vertical divider, then the VOICE logo (a blue stylized 'V'/checkmark mark) with 'VOICE' and the subtitle 'VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT'.
notable_text: If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP; 1-855-48-VOICE; ICE.GOV/VOICE; VOICE - VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT
